calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change and Gender Change. Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and S. Vantree. Case not called on the record. Proceedings not reported.

Petitioner Joshua Kane Graham present in court.
Petitioner sworn.
Declaration of Sworn Physician on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.

The court grants the petition for Name Change to new name Kimberly Kane Graham and Gender from male to female.
Decree changing Name and Gender signed by the court.
